description:
A screenshot of the CLC+ (Copernicus Land Cover) Core User Admin support interface, displaying the "Data Catalogue" page. The top navigation bar shows links to "Data Catalogue", "EAGLE Ontology", "About EAGLE", "Organisations", "Users", and "CLC+ Core User Admin/Support". The main section features "Data Catalogue" with filter buttons: "Filter", "My organisation/s" (checked), "My data" (checked), "Ingestions" (checked), and "Extractions" (selected). To the right, there is a search bar and action buttons: "ADD INGESTION", "ADD EXTRACTION", and a dropdown menu with a trashcan icon.

Below this, a table lists various datasets with the following columns: "EAGLE Approved", "Name", "Type", "Created At", "Created By", "Country", "Region", "Reference Year", "Time Range", "Organisation/s", "Contact Person", "Status", and "INSPIRE Themes".

Visible rows include:
*   "Urban Atlas (UA) 2018", created "20.06.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "European Environ..." with "Reference Year 2018", "Time Range 29.06.2017 - 01.09.2018", by "CLC, European En...", Contact "Matteo.Mattiuzzi...", "Status USED", and "INSPIRE Themes Land use, Land cover".
*   "Urban Atlas (UA) 2018", created "20.02.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "European Environ..." with "Reference Year 2018", "Time Range 01.01.2017 - 31.12.2019", by "copernicus@eea...", "Status USED", and "INSPIRE Themes Land use, Land cover".
*   "Urban Atlas (UA) 2012", created "21.06.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "European Environ..." with "Reference Year 2012", "Time Range 24.03.2011 - 15.09.2013", by "CLC, European En...", Contact "Matteo.Mattiuzzi...", "Status PUBLISHED", and "INSPIRE Themes Land use, Land cover".
*   "Urban Atlas IBK_2018", created "21.11.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "Austria/Österreich" in "Innsbruck" with "Time Range 26.06.2017 - 28.08.2018", by "CLC, European En...", Contact "Matteo.Mattiuzzi...", "Status PROCESSING".
*   "test_GRAMD", created "05.09.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "Austria/Österreich" with "Status INGESTED_PREVIEW".
*   "Test 2023_10_19", created "19.10.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "Austria/Österreich" in "Linz-Wels" with "Status INGESTED_PREVIEW".
*   "Test 2023_10_18", created "18.10.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "Austria/Österreich" with "Status INGESTED_PREVIEW".
*   "Test", created "18.10.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "Austria/Österreich" with "Status INGESTED_PREVIEW".
*   "Riparian Zones (RZ) 20...", created "21.06.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "European Environ..." with "Reference Year 2018", "Time Range 01.03.2018 - 31.07.2018", by "CLC, European En...", Contact "copernicus@eea...", "Status USED", and "INSPIRE Themes Land use, Land cover".
*   "Riparian Zones (RZ) 20...", created "21.02.2023", by "CLC+ Core User Admin...", for "European Environ..." with "Reference Year 2018", "Time Range 01.03.2018 - 31.07.2018", by "European Environ...", Contact "copernicus@eea...", "Status USED", and "INSPIRE Themes Land use, Land cover".

The table also includes a pagination control at the bottom, showing "Items per page: 10" and indicating "1 - 10 of 32" entries. The "Type" column uses a document icon to signify dataset files. The "Status" column shows various stages such as "USED", "PUBLISHED", "PROCESSING", and "INGESTED_PREVIEW", reflecting the lifecycle of data within the system.
